_comment: CPU family regex catalog for the profile module. Match ProcessorNameString (from Win32_Processor.Name) against each 'regex' in order until one hits. 'generation' is used by downstream modules (e.g. power: Modern Standby detection on Intel 11th-gen+ and Ryzen 6000+). AMD Ryzen model numbering: first digit of the 4-digit number = generation. Intel Core: first 1-2 digits after i3/i5/i7/i9- = generation. Notes flag Modern-Standby-only families (S3 sleep dropped by the OEM).

families.notes: S3 sleep supported

families.family: AMD Ryzen 2000 series (Zen+ / Zen 1 Raven Ridge)
families.notes: S3 sleep supported
S3 sleep supported on desktop; some mobile OEMs Modern Standby
S3 sleep supported on most laptops
Mixed: desktop S3, mobile mostly Modern Standby
Modern Standby only on laptops. Known combo-card BT/WLAN sleep quirks.
Modern Standby only on laptops.

families.family: AMD Ryzen 8000 series (Zen 4 Hawk Point / Phoenix refresh)
families.notes: Modern Standby only on laptops.
Modern Standby only on laptops.

S3 sleep supported

families.notes: S3 sleep supported on most machines
S3 sleep supported

Modern Standby only on laptops. P/E hybrid cores.
Modern Standby only on laptops. P/E hybrid cores. Known desktop degradation issue at high voltage.
Modern Standby only on laptops. P/E hybrid cores. Same voltage/degradation lineage as 13th gen.
Modern Standby only. Tiled architecture with NPU.

families.notes: Modern Standby only.
